feed.title: SAP Community - SD (Sales and Distribution)
feed.subtitle: SD (Sales and Distribution) Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Splitting criteria change
entry.content:
Hello SAP Experts,

The following splitting criterias are used by the standard SAP to split invoices:

  •  Payer

  • Payment terms

  • Destination country

  • Actual GI date

  • Incoterms

  • Billing date and billing due date

  • Billing doc type

  • Foreign data trade 

  • Sold to party

  • Company Code

We have a business requirement to change the foreign data trade criteria to ship to party? Is it possible to do that? What are the impacts in changing this criteria?

Our client wants the splitting of invoices to be done based on the ship to party not on the final recipient .

Could you please help me on that?

Regards,

Liza

@Lakshmipathi

entry.title: Unable to invoice SO line items
entry.content:
Hello All, good day.

We currently have issue on SO line items not being invoiced.

In the SO, the affected line items are currently set with rejection reason to avoid being processed and possibly the creation of a new PR/PO document.

The SO already was created with a PO document and this was processed by business. However in the PO document, the item was set with deletion flag which was a mistake. Customer shared they already processed the PO and would not want to create a new PO document for the affected SO items. Since it was not possible to reverse the deletion flag in the PO, they have done direct posting to invoice the PO document.

Now we are having issue on how to invoice the SO items.

Can anyone suggest/share idea if there is any way we can invoice the SO items without removing the rejection reason or creating new set of PR/PO documents?

Thank you in advance 🙂

entry.title: Bapi for delivery split and batch change
entry.content:
Hi, experts.

Which bapi/fm i can use for delivery split and then batch change?

I've tried with 'bapi_outb_delivery_split_dec'

For split and 'ws_delivery_update' for batch change.

 

The problem i stuck is

1) There is a commit inside 'bapi_outb_delivery_split_dec' and i cannot rollback it.

2) 'bapi_outb_delivery_split_dec' doesn't delete null items and subitems.

3) i still not sure which exactly params i need to pass, to delete an item (10, 20, 30) and subitem (900000+) and tomake it work in 100% cases.

 

And it's still not good that if split makes good, but update not - i can't rollback the split.

I want to work it in one luw.

Which bapi/fm's i can use for it?

entry.title: Individual purchase requisitons from a single sales order
entry.content:
Hello,

I am working on a procure-to-order scenario (individual purchase order) with item category group: BANC, item category: TAB, and schedule line category: CB. When I save the sales order, the system generates a single purchase requisition containing multiple line items corresponding to the sales order lines.

What is the configuration tbd so the system, will create different PRs when saving the sales order.

entry.title: Advanced Inter company sales and Advanced Customer returns
entry.content:
Hello,

Can someone advice what is the total number of days and resources required required to design, configure and unit test , quality test the following two items . If someone pls can give answer based on certain assumptions that will be also fine.

1) Advanced inter company sales

2) Advanced customer returns.

rgds

sar

entry.title: Table KNVI ( Customer Master Tax Indicator ) getting updated with extra irrelevant rows
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

Table KNVI ( Customer Master Tax Indicator ) getting updated with extra irrelevant rows ( junk data ) for a particular customer once is few months not regularly.  What might be the reason for this ? 

Would be grateful for your replies. 

Thanks,

Devendra

entry.title: Revenue Account Determination based on Purchase order Type VBKD-BSARK
entry.content:
I am working on revenue account determination, and there is a requirement to determine the GL account based on the Purchase Order type (VBKD-BSARK). While creating a condition table for this field in V/03, I noticed it was not available in the field catalog. To resolve this, I added the field to the following structures: KOMCV, KOMKCV, and KOMPCV.

After making these changes, the field became available, and I successfully created the condition table and completed the configuration. However, during testing, it is not working as expected. The purchase order field is blank when checking the Revenue Account Analysis in the invoice (screenshot attached).

Did I miss anything in the configuration? Please advise, as this is a bit urgent.

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: un approved invoice in SAP.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a scenario in which we need a commercial invoice for custom clearance.

Is it possible to get a sort of invoice (which could be non-approved by accounting) and later once approved by Finance we do a accounting entry?

Delivery > good issue > Un-approved invoice (Which could become approved once approved by finance).

What would be the recommendation, please note, we are not using SAP EWM.

entry.title: How to Update Material Status on Sales Org 2 Tab in ECC
entry.content:
Dear Sir or Madam,

Could you kindly specify the transaction code in ECC that is necessary to deactivate a sales organization for a specific SKU as shown in the provided screenshot? To move it from AC to OB.

entry.title: Batch Job does not trigger replication to C4C
entry.content:
Hi - we have a (custom program) job that updates Sales blocks using our dunning process (KNVV-LIFSD). But once the update has been completed on the BP, it does not trigger the replication to downstream system like C4C. 

Note that if we update via MDG or BP tcode, replication happens without issues. How do we ensure that any batch jobs that updates master data triggers the replication?

Thanks in advance!

Marc

entry.title: Contact person role BUP001 not populated using Customer object in LTMC
entry.content:
Hello,

I am creating contact person for BP customer using LTMC object customer. The contact person is created for BP but role BUP001 has not assigned to contact person.

Is there any way to achieve this functionality using Customer or Customer extension template??

We want customer with role FLCU00 & FLCU01 role and contact person with BUP001 role.

Thankyou in advance.

 

Best Regards,

Garima

entry.title: SD: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse XXX Message No.: V1392
entry.content:
Hello everyone

I'm entering an order in TRX VA01, but when I place the material, it shows an error: Material XXX does not exist in warehouse P010. Message number: V1392. I'm seeing the error because I have the material stored in warehouse P011, and I need to send it to that warehouse.

Is there some extra configuration where it's taking warehouse P010 instead of P011?

Thank you for your help.

entry.title: Retroacitve Billing in S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Is it possible to set up retroactive billing on S/4 Public Cloud that will only approve the billing documents by differences?

Example is as follows: A client subsequently creates a condition record for a promotional rebate discount, retroactive billing should be calculated only according to that condition record. If it possible, could you please assist me?

Thank you in advance, 

Marina

entry.title: How to define SD doc number range in app Configure BOP segment_S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Request is to define order number range and set up mass ATP run in S/4 Public Cloud. Is it correct way to define order number range in application Configure BOP Segment ? Choosing Sales and Distribution Document Number as selection condition and operator "is between" should work but it's not (for single order numbers works just fine).

Thank you in advance

Marina

entry.title: Error no accounts maintained for company code clearing between company codes x and y
entry.content:
Hi All,

I'm getting this error while doing PGI process.

Kindly suggest how to resolve it

Regards

entry.title: Manage Sales Plans - Dimensions
entry.content:
Hello - we are in UAT testing for our S4/HANA Public Cloud instance. I came across "Sales Plans" and find that this could be a really useful App, however I would like to add Segment and Profit Center Group (hierarchy) as available dimensions to create a sales plan from. 

Does anyone know if you can modify the list of available Dimensions to include additional STANDARD fields? I am quite surprised that these aren't already available in the dropdown list.

entry.title: what is the default role and grouping considered during customer creation in BP?
entry.content:
Hi,

When I tried to create customer in BP, I received an error message "Grouping BP02 has external number assignment, enter a number".

1. My system has various groupings defined, but out of them all why is it looking for BP02? is there any settings behind it? As a user do I have any roles assigned to me?

2. Also, do we have any settings to link Customer group(KDGRP) to Customer Account group(KTOKD)?

Thanks for you prompt replies

entry.title: Delivery date calculation with Custom Calendar in Sales order
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

  Please suggest How to overwrite custom calendar while creating sales order to compute / Calculate Material Availability date and Delivery date, without assigning the Custom calendar to Sales Organization, Plant, Shipping Point, Customer or any determination methods.

  Kindly Suggest any User Exit, BAdi.

Thanks.

Regards,

Raji Reddy

entry.title: Rounding profile: by using the grid the functionality seems not working
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

 

using di Rounding profile on products we have an issue and the system seems not working. The system is I-RS and so inserting the generic article and quantity the system displays the characteristics grid (size and color) and we can insert the quantities to be exploded in the Variant articles. After the setup of rounding profile, if we insert directly the variant article in the sales order, the system works correctly and apply the rounding but by using the grid the system doesn’t do anything and the functionality seems not working at all even after the explosion of all variants.

entry.title: Account determination error in MIGO
entry.content:
I am getting below error while posting some goods through MIGO tcode .

Can someone please help to resolve this?
